no: HD remastered spell icons by Renegade0. Detects and supports LeUI, InfinityUI, PocketPlayUI, MSFM, and Spontaneous Casting. Install after UI mods. IWD:EE colors option adds green icons for summoning spells
sum: Remastered HD spell icons for IE:EE games

co.n: Install Remastered Spell Icons Core Component
co.tp2n: Install Remastered Spell Icons Core Component
co.no: Core HD spell icons. Detects installed UI mods (LeUI, InfinityUI, PocketPlay) and applies compatible icon set

co.n: Use IWD:EE Colors (Green icons for summoning spells)
co.tp2n: Use IWD:EE Colors (Green icons for summoning spells)
co.no: Optional: uses IWD:EE color scheme (green for summoning). BG1EE/BG2EE/EET only (not for IWDEE which already has these)
